html:
NeutralColdFrozenWarmHot

“Gains heat when near something hot, and cools near something cold.

It will warm or cool the holder depending on its temperature.”

-

The Thermal Stone is an item in Don't Starve Together. It requires an Alchemy Engine to prototype, and costs 10 Stone, 1 Pickaxe, and 3 Flint to craft. Its purpose is to delay body temperature change, preventing the player from Freezing in the Winter as well as Overheating in Summer.

A Thermal Stone can be heated up by placing it next to a Fire Pit, Magma, Scaled Furnace, Dwarf Star or a burning object. It can absorb heat regardless of whether it is on the ground, in a Chest, or in the player's inventory. Different heat sources affect the maximum degree the stone can attain. Also, a Red Hot Thermal Stone can emit enough light to ward off Charlie.

On the other hand, a Thermal Stone can be cooled by placing it next to an Endothermic Fire, in an Ice Box, in Snow Chester, or near a Polar Light.

While carried in any Backpack, including the Insulated Pack, Thermal Stones can still affect the player's temperature.

Every time the Thermal Stone goes from Freezing White or Glowing Red to Gray, the Thermal Stone loses 12.5% of its durability. It can, however, be repaired with a Sewing Kit or Trusty Tape, and one use of which will fully repair it.

Blue and gray Thermal Stones can be given to the Antlion to appease it, delaying its rage by 4 days. When offered white, yellow or red Thermal Stones, it will become enraged.

Contents

  • 1 Mechanics
    • 1.1 Temperature Stages
  • 2 Usage
  • 3 Skins
  • 4 Tips
  • 5 Trivia
  • 6 Bugs
  • 7 Assets
  • 8 Gallery

Mechanics

A Thermal Stone acts as a heat source with an internal temperature between -20° and +90°. With the thermal stone in the inventory, the player's own body will attempt to reach a temperature given by the formula: 

T_b = (T_a + 2.1*T_h)/3.1

where T_b is the target body temperature, T_a is the ambient temperature, and T_h is the temperature of the thermal stone. This formula means that both T_a and T_b are considered, only T_h is given 2.1 times the importance.

If the stone is on the ground instead, the target body temperature is instead given by: 

T_b = (T_a + T_h)/2

which is simply the average (midpoint) between the ambient temperature and the thermal stone's temperature.

The temperature of a heated thermal Stone drops at a rate determined by 120 insulation, which is 1 degree every 5 seconds. This insulation is only used for determining the stone's own temperature loss and does not affect the player.

Temperature Stages

The stage of the thermal stone is determined relative to the ambient temperature and each stage emits a fixed temperature:

Stage Internal Temperature
more than 30° below ambient temperature
between 30° and 10° below ambient temperature
between 10° below and 10° above ambient temperature
between 10° and 30° above ambient temperature
more than 30° above ambient temperature

Usage

×2

Skins

Main article: Belongings

  • The Loyal Metamorphosed Flame skin was awarded for watching 6 hours of Don't Starve Together on Twitch from May 9, 2019 to July 25, 2019, and from January 7, 2021 to January 14, 2021. It is also available in the Klei Rewards shop for 1,200 Klei points.
  • The Loyal Pyric Core skin was awarded for watching 3 hours of Don't Starve Together on Twitch from Oct 27, 2025 to Nov 24, 2025.
Woven - Elegant
Fantasmical Collection
Charmed Heatstone
A warm glow radiates from deep within the crystal.
Loyal
Crystalline Collection
Metamorphosed Flame
A vibrant flame extracted in crystallized form from a passionate soul.
See ingame
Loyal
Orbital Collection
Pyric Core
A flame burns deep within.

Tips

  • The crafting recipe will accept pickaxes of any durability, so it is advised to use pickaxes that are at 3% durability to avoid wasting their use.
  • Having more than one Thermal Stone, one carried with the player and the other one kept charged (near a heat source for warmth or in an Ice Box for cooling) allows quick switching, instead of waiting for a single one to charge.
  • It is advised to keep cool Thermal Stones in an Ice Box and hot Thermal Stones near a Scaled Furnace so players don't need to worry about losing durability of the Thermal Stones.
  • Multiple Scaled Furnaces can heat up the Thermal Stone more than just one Scaled Furnace. 6 Scaled Furnaces can reach the maximum degree of the Stone, although only 4 are required to reach 80°.
  • The best way to maximize the heat from Thermal Stone is to place it near Magma or a burning object until it glows brightly. This will provide the maximum heat with the longest duration.

Trivia

  • This item was added in the Doorway to Adventure update.
  • The Thermal Stone was renamed from Heat Stone to best fit its functionality in the Reign of Giants DLC, since it can also be used to cool the player.
  • In the final release of the DLC, Where there's a Wilson..., the Thermal Stone received a new, cleaner asset for when it is at minimum temperature. Also in this update, the minimum temperature for the Thermal Stone was set to 25 in the Summer, solving the previous issue where holding a frozen Thermal Stone would cause freezing damage in the Summer.

Bugs

  • In the console edition of Don't Starve Together, Thermal Stones sometimes may not heat up, even when placed next to a fire.

Assets

It can absorb heat regardless of whether it is on the ground, in a Chest, or in the player's inventory. Different heat sources affect the maximum degree the stone can attain. Also, a Red Hot Thermal Stone can emit enough light to ward off Charlie.
On the other hand, a Thermal Stone can be cooled by placing it next to an Endothermic Fire, in an Ice Box, in Snow Chester, or near a Polar Light.
While carried in any Backpack, including the Insulated Pack, Thermal Stones can still affect the player's temperature.

Blue and gray Thermal Stones can be given to the Antlion to appease it, delaying its rage by 4 days. When offered white, yellow or red Thermal Stones, it will become enraged.

Mechanics[edit | edit source]
A Thermal Stone acts as a heat source with an internal temperature between -20° and +90°. With the thermal stone in the inventory, the player's own body will attempt to reach a temperature given by the formula:
T_b = (T_a + 2.1*T_h)/3.1
where T_b is the target body temperature, T_a is the ambient temperature, and T_h is the temperature of the thermal stone. This formula means that both T_a and T_b are considered, only T_h is given 2.1 times the importance.
If the stone is on the ground instead, the target body temperature is instead given by:
T_b = (T_a + T_h)/2
which is simply the average (midpoint) between the ambient temperature and the thermal stone's temperature.
The temperature of a heated thermal Stone drops at a rate determined by 120 insulation, which is 1 degree every 5 seconds. This insulation is only used for determining the stone's own temperature loss and does not affect the player.
Temperature Stages[edit | edit source]
The stage of the thermal stone is determined relative to the ambient temperature and each stage emits a fixed temperature:
Stage
Internal Temperature
more than 30° below ambient temperature
between 30° and 10° below ambient temperature
between 10° below and 10° above ambient temperature
between 10° and 30° above ambient temperature
more than 30° above ambient temperature

Skins[edit | edit source]
Main article: Belongings
The Loyal Metamorphosed Flame skin was awarded for watching 6 hours of Don't Starve Together on Twitch from May 9, 2019 to July 25, 2019, and from January 7, 2021 to January 14, 2021. It is also available in the Klei Rewards shop for 1,200 Klei points.
The Loyal Pyric Core skin was awarded for watching 3 hours of Don't Starve Together on Twitch from Oct 27, 2025 to Nov 24, 2025.

Tips[edit | edit source]
The crafting recipe will accept pickaxes of any durability, so it is advised to use pickaxes that are at 3% durability to avoid wasting their use.
Having more than one Thermal Stone, one carried with the player and the other one kept charged (near a heat source for warmth or in an Ice Box for cooling) allows quick switching, instead of waiting for a single one to charge.
It is advised to keep cool Thermal Stones in an Ice Box and hot Thermal Stones near a Scaled Furnace so players don't need to worry about losing durability of the Thermal Stones.
Multiple Scaled Furnaces can heat up the Thermal Stone more than just one Scaled Furnace. 6 Scaled Furnaces can reach the maximum degree of the Stone, although only 4 are required to reach 80°.
The best way to maximize the heat from Thermal Stone is to place it near Magma or a burning object until it glows brightly. This will provide the maximum heat with the longest duration.
Trivia[edit | edit source]
This item was added in the Doorway to Adventure update.
The Thermal Stone was renamed from Heat Stone to best fit its functionality in the Reign of Giants DLC, since it can also be used to cool the player.
In the final release of the DLC, Where there's a Wilson..., the Thermal Stone received a new, cleaner asset for when it is at minimum temperature. Also in this update, the minimum temperature for the Thermal Stone was set to 25 in the Summer, solving the previous issue where holding a frozen Thermal Stone would cause freezing damage in the Summer.

In the console edition of Don't Starve Together, Thermal Stones sometimes may not heat up, even when placed next to a fire.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Đá Nhiệt là một vật phẩm trong Don't Starve Together. Nó yêu cầu Máy luyện kim để tạo nguyên mẫu và tốn 10 Đá, 1 Cuốc và 3 Đá lửa để chế tạo. Mục đích của nó là trì hoãn sự thay đổi nhiệt độ cơ thể, ngăn người chơi khỏi bị đóng băng vào mùa đông cũng như quá nóng vào mùa hè.

It will warm or cool the holder depending on its temperature.}} The '''Thermal Stone''' is an item in ''[[Don't Starve Together]]''. It requires an [[Alchemy Engine]] to prototype, and costs 10 [[Stone]], 1 [[Pickaxe]], and 3 [[Flint]] to craft. Its purpose is to delay body temperature change, preventing the player from [[Freezing]] in the [[Winter]] as well as [[Overheating]] in [[Summer]]. A Thermal Stone can be heated up by placing it next to a [[Fire Pit]], [[Magma]], [[Scaled Furnace]], [[Dwarf Star]] or a burning object. It can absorb heat regardless of whether it is on the ground, in a [[Chest]], or in the player's inventory. Different [[Freezing#Game_Mechanics|heat sources]] affect the maximum degree the stone can attain. Also, a Red Hot Thermal Stone can emit enough light to ward off [[Charlie]]. On the other hand, a Thermal Stone can be cooled by placing it next to an [[Endothermic Fire]], in an [[Ice Box]], in [[Snow Chester]], or near a [[Polar Light]]. While carried in any [[Backpack]], including the [[Insulated Pack]], Thermal Stones can still affect the player's temperature. Every time the Thermal Stone goes from Freezing White or Glowing Red to Gray, the Thermal Stone loses 12.5% of its durability. It can, however, be repaired with a [[Sewing Kit]] or [[Trusty Tape]], and one use of which will fully repair it. Blue and gray Thermal Stones can be given to the [[Antlion]] to appease it, delaying its rage by 4 days. When offered white, yellow or red Thermal Stones, it will become enraged. == Mechanics == A Thermal Stone acts as a heat source with an internal temperature between -20° and +90°. With the thermal stone in the inventory, the player's own body will attempt to reach a temperature given by the formula: T_b = (T_a + 2.1*T_h)/3.1 where T_b is the target body temperature, T_a is the ambient temperature, and T_h is the temperature of the thermal stone. This formula means that both T_a and T_b are considered, only T_h is given 2.1 times the importance. If the stone is on the ground instead, the target body temperature is instead given by: T_b = (T_a + T_h)/2 which is simply the average (midpoint) between the ambient temperature and the thermal stone's temperature. The temperature of a heated thermal Stone drops at a rate determined by 120 insulation, which is 1 degree every 5 seconds. This insulation is only used for determining the stone's own temperature loss and does not affect the player. === Temperature Stages === The stage of the thermal stone is determined relative to the ambient temperature and each stage emits a fixed temperature: {| class="wikitable" !Stage !Internal Temperature |- |[[File:Heat Stone Stage 1.png|56px]] |more than 30° below ambient temperature |- |[[File:Thermal_Stone_Stage_2.png|56px]] |between 30° and 10° below ambient temperature |- |[[File:Thermal Stone.png|56px]] |between 10° below and 10° above ambient temperature |- |[[File:Heat Stone Stage 4.png|56px]] |between 10° and 30° above ambient temperature |- |[[File:Heat Stone Stage 5.png|56px]] |more than 30° above ambient temperature |} == {{pic32|Icon Tools}} Usage == {{Recipe |item1 = Thermal Stone |count1 = 1 |item2 = Papyrus |count2 = 2 |tool = Bookcase |result = Tempering Temperatures |character = Wickerbottom}} == [[File:Skins Icon.png|32px|link=]] Skins == {{Main|Belongings#Other Items Skins|Belongings}} * The '''Loyal Metamorphosed Flame''' skin was awarded for watching 6 hours of ''Don't Starve Together'' on Twitch from May 9, 2019 to July 25, 2019, and from January 7, 2021 to January 14, 2021. It is also available in the Klei Rewards shop for 1,200 Klei points. * The '''Loyal Pyric Core''' skin was awarded for watching 3 hours of ''Don't Starve Together'' on Twitch from Oct 27, 2025 to Nov 24, 2025.
{{SkinInfo |image = Charmed Heatstone Icon.png |rarity = Woven - Elegant |collection = Fantasmical Collection |name = Charmed Heatstone |description = A warm glow radiates from deep within the crystal. }} {{SkinInfo |image = Metamorphosed Flame Icon.png |rarity = Loyal |collection = Crystalline Collection |name = Metamorphosed Flame |description = A vibrant flame extracted in crystallized form from a passionate soul. |ingame = The Metamorphosed Flame.png }} {{SkinInfo |image = Pyric Core Icon.png |rarity = Loyal |collection = Orbital Collection |name = Pyric Core |description = A flame burns deep within. }}
== {{Pic32|Prototype}} Tips == * The crafting recipe will accept pickaxes of any durability, so it is advised to use pickaxes that are at 3% durability to avoid wasting their use. * Having more than one Thermal Stone, one carried with the player and the other one kept charged (near a heat source for warmth or in an Ice Box for cooling) allows quick switching, instead of waiting for a single one to charge. * It is advised to keep cool Thermal Stones in an Ice Box and hot Thermal Stones near a Scaled Furnace so players don't need to worry about losing durability of the Thermal Stones. * Multiple Scaled Furnaces can heat up the Thermal Stone more than just one Scaled Furnace. 6 Scaled Furnaces can reach the maximum degree of the Stone, although only 4 are required to reach 80°. *The best way to maximize the heat from Thermal Stone is to place it near [[Magma]] or a burning object until it glows brightly. This will provide the maximum heat with the longest duration. =={{Pic32|Placeholder}} Trivia== * This item was added in the ''[[Version History#Doorway to Adventure|Doorway to Adventure]]'' update. * The Thermal Stone was renamed from Heat Stone to best fit its functionality in the ''[[Reign of Giants]]'' DLC, since it can also be used to cool the player. * In the final release of the DLC, ''[[Don't Starve: Reign of Giants#Version History|Where there's a Wilson...]]'', the Thermal Stone received a new, cleaner asset for when it is at minimum temperature. Also in this update, the minimum temperature for the Thermal Stone was set to 25 in the Summer, solving the previous issue where holding a frozen Thermal Stone would cause [[freezing]] damage in the Summer. == {{pic32|Mosquito}} Bugs == * In the console edition of ''Don't Starve Together'', Thermal Stones sometimes may not heat up, even when placed next to a fire. == [[File:Research Notes.png|32px|link=]] Assets == |-| Thermal Stone= Thermal Stone 1 Dropped.png|Frozen Thermal Stone 2 Dropped.png|Cold Thermal Stone Dropped.png|Neutral Thermal Stone 4 Dropped.png|Warm Thermal Stone 5 Dropped.png|Hot |-| Charmed Heatstone= File:Charmed Heatstone Dropped 1.png|Frozen File:Charmed Heatstone Dropped 2.png|Cold File:Charmed Heatstone Dropped.png|Neutral File:Charmed Heatstone Dropped 4.png|Warm File:Charmed Heatstone Dropped 5.png|Hot |-| Metamorphosed Flame= File:Metamorphosed Flame Dropped 1.png|Frozen File:Metamorphosed Flame Dropped 2.png|Cold File:Metamorphosed Flame Dropped.png|Neutral File:Metamorphosed Flame Dropped 4.png|Warm File:Metamorphosed Flame Dropped 5.png|Hot |-| Pyric Core= File:Pyric Core Dropped 1.png|Frozen File:Pyric Core Dropped 2.png|Cold File:Pyric Core Dropped.png|Neutral File:Pyric Core Dropped 4.png|Warm File:Pyric Core Dropped 5.png|Hot == {{Pic32|Blueprint}} Gallery == heat.png|A Thermal Stone near a fire. heatlight.png|A comparison between a Thermal Stone's light radius and a Crock Pot's light radius.
